narrative:
Precinct 0035 Washington (precinct in Shelby County) has 1,277 registered voters, with 57.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.2 percentage points.
